title: Sarah's List
subtitle: Age 41. Female. Straight.
summary: Age 41. Female. Straight. From the sixth grade romantic to the clumsy writer—fifteen years, two kids, one mortgage.
brandExplainer: Hookup Lists is a weekly chronicle of the highlights (and lowlights) from one person's actual hookup history.

entries.title: The Sixth Grade Romantic
entries.body: First kiss. A Blues Brothers dance at the JCC. He gave me a Presidents of the United States of America CD for Valentine's Day. No tongue. No sparks. But my diary entry was basically fireworks.

entries.title: The Camp Crush
entries.body: We were both counselors at Jewish summer camp. Lean, aloof, smelled like sunscreen and Marlboros. I was obsessed. He came out four years later, which honestly just confirmed his hotness.

entries.title: The Awkward First Time
entries.body: Childhood friend turned "first time". I confessed my virginity. He said, "We should fix that." We did. It was awkward and oddly bureaucratic.

entries.title: The Internet Cafe Find
entries.body: I met him at an internet cafe in Thailand. On our second night shagging, I bit his shoulder. He ghosted. My sexual experimentation phase lasted exactly one nibble.

entries.title: The Almost Forever
entries.body: We moved in together. He was open to converting for me. After a year and a half, we outgrew each other in slow motion. We broke up when he left for grad school and I was so relieved.

entries.title: The Clumsy Writer
entries.body: A journalist that spilled wine all over himself on our first date. It was a setup. I told him I wasn't looking for anything serious. He said he only did serious. Fifteen years, two kids, and one mortgage later, he was right.

disclaimer: Disclaimer: All names and identifiable details have been modified to protect the reputations of our contributors in the eyes of their partners, colleagues, and parents.
